calendar.matters:
(Amended) Notice Of Motion And Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Adminstrative Mandmus
Off Calendar Sep-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER OFFICER JASON KIRCHNER'S (Amended) Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus is Off calendar. Duplicate entry. Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

MOTION For Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Adminstrative Mandamus; Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Sep-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Adrian G. Driscoll, Esq. of Ropers Majeski Kohn Bentley, Tel. 415.972.6329, for Petitioner and moving party;
Wayne K. Snodgrass, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.4675, for Respondent and opposing party.

The matter was argued. After hearing, PETITIONER OFFICER JASON KIRCHNER'S Petition For Writ Of Adminstrative Mandamus WAS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. Each party to submit a proposed order. Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR # 7077

(AFTER HEARING, THE COURT GRANTED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS. ORDER SIGNED. PREVAILING PARTY PETITIONER TO GIVE NOTICE OF THE ORDER.)

MOTION For Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Adminstrative Mandamus; Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Jul-25-2012 Continued To Sep-20-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
